description: Epic data integration with BetterContact waterfall enrichment API — enrichment + Lead Finder + cascade + deliverability tracking across Ops tables, contacts, and copilot skills

input.source: User request + BetterContact API docs (doc.bettercontact.rocks) + 5 research agents
extractedRequirements: BYOK integration — each org enters their own BetterContact API key via Settings > Integrations
Email + phone enrichment for contacts in Ops tables (async submit → poll/webhook → populate cells)
Lead Finder as a table source — search BetterContact for new leads by company/people filters, import into Ops tables
Fire-and-forget UX with notification when enrichment completes
Email deliverability status column — surface catch_all/deliverable/undeliverable as visible enrichment data
Smart polling with exponential backoff (2s → 5s → 10s → 30s, cap at 150s Supabase limit)
Provider attribution tracking — store which BetterContact sub-provider found the email
Cascade enrichment support — add BetterContact as a step in enrich-router cascade (fallback after Apollo)
Credit balance check before enrichment (BetterContact GET /account endpoint)
Copilot skill for natural language enrichment triggers
Webhook receiver for async results (with polling fallback)
Custom fields pass-through for row/cell ID mapping back to Ops tables
extractedConstraints: BYOK only — no platform-provided API key
Store API key in integration_credentials table (provider='bettercontact'), never VITE_ prefix
Follow Apollo/Explorium enrichment patterns (enrich once, column many, cache in source_data.bettercontact)
Rate limit: 60 req/min per BetterContact API key
BetterContact API is async only — POST /async returns request_id, GET /async/{id} to poll
Auth via X-API-Key header to app.bettercontact.rocks/api/v2
Batch enrichment with custom_fields for row mapping
improvementsAccepted: Lead Finder as table source (not just enrichment)

team.reason: 10 stories, 2 external API surfaces (enrichment + lead finder), async webhook architecture (novel), security surface (API key storage, webhook verification, RLS), cascade cross-feature dependency

stories.title: Integration Credentials & Config Modal
stories.description: Add BetterContact as a provider in integration_credentials. Create useBetterContactIntegration hook (clone useExploriumIntegration) and BetterContactConfigModal. Register in Settings > Integrations page with API key input + credit balance display.

stories.title: Database Schema Migration
stories.description: Add 'bettercontact' to dynamic_tables source_type CHECK. Create bettercontact_requests table (tracks async enrichment jobs: request_id, table_id, column_id, status, contacts count). Add RLS policies. Add bettercontact_property_name to dynamic_table_columns.

stories.title: Copilot Skill Definition
stories.description: Create skills/atomic/bettercontact-enrich/SKILL.md with triggers for 'enrich with bettercontact', 'find emails', 'get phone numbers'. Create skills/atomic/bettercontact-lead-finder/SKILL.md for prospecting triggers.

stories.title: Submit Enrichment Edge Function
stories.description: Create supabase/functions/bettercontact-enrich/index.ts. Router pattern with actions: submit, status, credits. Submit reads contacts from dynamic_table_rows, posts to BetterContact POST /async with custom_fields containing row_id+column_id for mapping. Creates bettercontact_requests tracking row. Marks cells as pending. Pre-flight credit check.

stories.title: Async Result Polling + Webhook Receiver
stories.description: Add bettercontact handler to webhook-integrations router. Receive webhook payload, match to bettercontact_requests by request_id, write results into dynamic_table_cells (email, phone, status, provider). Cache full response in source_data.bettercontact. Deduct credits via costTracking. Also implement polling fallback with exponential backoff (2s→5s→10s→30s) for when webhooks fail.

stories.title: Email Deliverability Status Column
stories.description: Add 'bettercontact_status' enrichment column type that surfaces contact_email_address_status (deliverable/catch_all/catch_all_safe/catch_all_not_safe/undeliverable/not_found) with color-coded badges. Add to enrichmentTemplates.ts with BetterContact-specific templates: Verified Email, Phone Number, Email Deliverability Status, Provider Attribution.

stories.title: Frontend Enrichment Trigger + Progress UI
stories.description: Wire BetterContact into Ops table enrichment UI. Add as enrichment source option. Fire-and-forget: submit shows toast 'Enrichment submitted', progress tracked via enrichment_jobs table polling, toast notification when complete. Leverage existing EnrichmentProgressBar component.

stories.title: Lead Finder — Search + Import to Table
stories.description: Create supabase/functions/bettercontact-lead-finder/index.ts. POST /lead_finder/async with company/people filters. Poll GET /lead_finder/async/{id} for results. Create new Ops table from results (source_type='bettercontact'). Frontend: Add 'BetterContact Lead Finder' as table source option alongside Apollo search. Search form with company name/domain, job title, location filters.

stories.title: Cascade Enrichment Integration
stories.description: Add BetterContact as a cascade step in enrich-router. When Apollo/AI Ark enrichment returns no email, auto-fallback to BetterContact's 20+ provider waterfall. Configurable cascade order in org settings. Update enrich-router/handlers/cascade.ts.

stories.title: Provider Attribution + Analytics
stories.description: Store email_provider from BetterContact response in source_data. Add 'Provider' column option to Ops tables showing which sub-provider found the data. Surface enrichment stats in integration settings: total enriched, success rate, avg credits per lookup, top providers.

parallelGroups.description: Core functions + UI — depends on Group 1
Async results + status columns — depends on submit function
Cascade + analytics — depends on full enrichment pipeline

risks.issue: Must store in integration_credentials, never VITE_ prefix
No mechanism to prevent re-enriching same contact
risks.mitigation: Check source_data.bettercontact cache + skip_completed flag + force_refresh override
Pre-flight credit check + confirmation dialog for >50 rows + per-org quota

risks.issue: Novel pattern vs sync enrichment (Apollo/AI Ark)
